meta.title: SQL Pro - Professional SQLite Database Manager
meta.description: A modern, cross-platform SQLite database manager with encrypted database support, visual diff preview, and powerful query tools.

hero.title: SQL Pro
hero.subtitle: Professional SQLite Database Manager
hero.description: SQLCipher encryption support, visual diff preview, powerful query tools. Cross-platform, modern, and efficient.

features.title: Powerful Features,
features.subtitle: SQL Pro provides a complete SQLite database management solution

database.title: Database Management
database.description: SQLite and SQLCipher encrypted database support, secure password storage, multi-connection tabbed interface

query.title: Query Tools
query.description: Monaco editor with syntax highlighting, intelligent autocomplete, Vim mode, query history search

data.title: Data Operations
data.description: Inline table editing, diff preview before applying, bulk operations, advanced multi-column filtering

compare.title: Schema & Data Compare
compare.description: Compare database schemas and table data between connections, generate migration scripts automatically

visualization.title: Visualization
visualization.description: ER diagram relationships, structure view browsing, automatic dark/light theme switching

security.title: Secure Encryption
security.description: SQLCipher support, seamless encrypted database integration, secure keychain storage

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform
crossPlatform.description: Native support for macOS, Windows, Linux with unified experience and high performance

download.title: Start using
download.subtitle: Free download, cross-platform support

pricing.note: All plans include free updates. Cancel subscription anytime.
